channel.title: Podcast 監察 Podcast Monitor
channel.description: 精選財經及科技 Podcast 最新集數，自動監察更新

item.title: The Big Macro Force That's Been Driving Stocks Higher for Years — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

節目探討股市長期上升的宏觀經濟因素，分析企業盈利增長與股票估值提升的背後驅動力，並探究為何股票估值未能回歸歷史平均水平。

Stocks have gone up over the years because corporate earnings continue to grow. That part is straightforward. But in addition to rising stock prices, we've also seen rising stock market valuations. For years, investors have talked about stocks being unreasonably priced, and yet they haven't reverted to historical norms. But perhaps there's a good explanation for this, beyond just animal spirits. Jonathan Heathcote is an economist at the Minneapolis Federal Reserve Bank, who recently co-authored ...

Duration: 36:08

#股票 #宏觀經濟 #股市估值 #企業盈利 #聯邦儲備銀行 #明尼阿波利斯 #股價上升 #估值比率

item.title: BOOKstore Economics — Planet Money
item.author: Planet Money
item.description:
Planet Money

探討書店如何選擇上架書籍，以及書店作為出版業最後把關者對讀者閱讀選擇的影響。

How do bookstores choose the books they stock, and how does that affect what customers read? It may not seem like it, but every shelf in a bookstore is a highly valuable and contested piece of commercial real estate. And for every new book that a bookstore decides to stock, there are thousands of others that did not make the cut. So how do bookstores make those decisions? And how will the Planet Money book fare under the discerning eyes of the booksellers, the final gatekeepers in the long gaunt...

Duration: 40:52

#書店 #書籍 #出版業 #商業 #經濟 #選書 #Planet Money

item.title: Haass on the War in Iran, Iran Oil Fallout, IMF Meeting Anxiety, US-China Rare Earth Competition — Wall Street Week
item.author: Wall Street Week
item.description:
Wall Street Week

美國與伊朗和平談判前景、伊朗石油危機對全球經濟衝擊，以及中美稀土礦物競爭成焦點。

This week, Richard Haass of Centerview Partners on what to expect out of US-Iran peace talks.  Plus, why Gulf states are begging Trump not to end the Iran war early and how the conflict could hit consumers, from gas prices to interest rates. And, former Canadian Finance Minister Chrystia Freeland warns of stagflation, a food crisis, and the growing strain on the US-led global order as finance leaders gather in Washington at the annual World Bank-IMF meetings. Later, how China quietly built a mon...

Duration: 48:08

#伊朗戰爭 #美伊談判 #伊朗石油 #IMF會議 #美中稀土競爭 #Richard Haass #Chrystia Freeland #海灣國家

item.title: It’s Not Just Oil. War in Iran Will Hike the Price of Nearly Everything You Buy — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

伊朗戰爭導致荷莫茲海峽運輸中斷，全球油價飆升並威脅食品、塑膠、半導體等商品供應，物價面臨廣泛上漲。

A core US demand heading into peace talks with Iran this weekend will be reopening the Strait of Hormuz, where a near-total shipping shutdown has led to rising global oil prices and threatened supplies of food, plastics, packaging and semiconductors. On today’s Big Take podcast, Sarah Holder speaks with Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal, hosts of Bloomberg’s Odd Lots podcast, about how the Hormuz shutdown is reverberating around commodities markets — and the lasting mark it could leave on the glo...

Duration: 20:57

#伊朗 #荷莫茲海峽 #油價 #戰爭 #供應鏈 #商品價格 #美國 #和平談判

item.title: Anthropic Model Scare Sparks Bessent, Powell Warning to Bank CEOs — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

美國財政部長貝森特及聯邦儲備局主席鮑威爾因Anthropic最新AI模型引發網絡風險擔憂，緊急召集華爾街銀行高管舉行會議。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Alexandra Semenova -Katherine Chiglinsky, Bloomberg US Finance Team Leader, discusses Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Fed Chair Jay Powell summoning Wall Street leaders to an urgent meeting on concerns that the latest AI model from Anthropic PBC will usher in an era of greater cyber risk. - Poonam Goyal, Senior U.S. E-Commerce and Retail Analyst at Bloomberg Intelligen...

Duration: 19:28

#Anthropic #AI模型 #貝森特 #鮑威爾 #銀行主管 #網絡風險 #華爾街

item.title: Humiliation Ritual — Money Stuff: The Podcast
item.author: Money Stuff: The Podcast
item.description:
Money Stuff: The Podcast

探討加密貨幣創辦人、投資策略及IPO融資等金融議題，涵蓋Elon Musk、Bill Ackman等關鍵人物的最新動向。

Katie and Matt discuss Satoshi Nakamoto, spotting liars, Katie being a witch, Bill Ackman doing stuff, Universal Music Group, SPARCs, asymmetric derivatives trades, Matt’s dream money management career, doomsday funds, Elon Musk’s big thing, the SpaceX IPO, Grok for bankers, humiliating IPO pitches and some ETF stuff for the ETF fans. See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

Duration: 30:53

#Humiliation Ritual #IPO #Satoshi Nakamoto #Bill Ackman #Elon Musk

item.title: Anthropic’s Cybersecurity Shock Wave + Ronan Farrow and Andrew Marantz on Their Sam Altman Investigation + One Good Thing — Hard Fork
item.author: Hard Fork
item.description:
Hard Fork

Anthropic的新AI模型因安全隱患被禁發布，卻已發現數千個軟件漏洞；記者Ronan Farrow與Andrew Marantz披露對Sam Altman的調查。

The new Anthropic model that’s too dangerous to be released is already revealing thousands of software vulnerabilities.

Duration: 1:04:06 · Ep. 189

#Anthropic #網絡安全 #Sam Altman #Ronan Farrow #Andrew Marantz #AI模型 #軟件漏洞 #調查

item.title: How Shipping Insurance Really Works During a War — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

探討戰爭期間海運保險如何運作，以伊朗衝突導致霍爾木茲海峽保險費用飆升為案例，分析海運保險對國際貿易的影響。

When the conflict with Iran started, some of the first headlines we saw had to do with shipping insurance. Marine insurers were said to be canceling war risk coverage for vessels going through the Strait of Hormuz. Premiums were said to surge. Meanwhile, the Trump administration announced it would offer its own insurance for ships traversing the Persian Gulf, in an effort to get things moving again. So why is insurance such a crucial part of maritime trade? And how does the system actually work?...

Duration: 53:18

#海運保險 #伊朗 #霍爾木茲海峽 #戰爭風險 #保費 #川普政府 #波斯灣

item.title: Class myths, an influx of e-ships, and pricey Olympics tix! — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

節目探討中產階級萎縮迷思、電動船舶興起，以及洛杉磯奧運票價高企等本週重點數據。

It’s Indicators of the Week, our weekly look at some of the most fascinating numbers from the news. (Now on YouTube !) On today’s episode: Is the middle class actually hollowing out ? Are more e-ships powered by batteries on the horizon? And how much are the first batch of L.A. Olympics tickets going for??? Related episodes: Why the Olympics cost so much The Indicator Takes On Batteries Are the Simpsons still middle class? For sponsor-free episodes of The Indicator from Planet Money, subscribe t...

Duration: 9:29

#中產階級 #電動船舶 #奧運 #洛杉磯 #票價 #經濟指標

item.title: One Small Step for NASA, One Giant Leap for the Lunar Economy — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

NASA阿爾忒彌斯二號任務創造載人航天紀錄，象徵月球經濟時代的來臨。

Need a little ‘moon joy’? Over the past eight days, four astronauts on NASA's Artemis II mission have been flying through the cosmos, breaking records for human spaceflight and sharing never-before-seen images from the dark side of the moon. On today’s Big Take podcast, guest host Stacey Vanek Smith and Bloomberg global space reporter Loren Grush talk about what the mission means for the future of galactic exploration and the burgeoning “lunar economy.” Read more: NASA’s Breathtaking Photos From...

Duration: 18:51

#NASA #阿爾忒彌斯二號 #月球 #太空探索 #月球經濟 #宇航員 #登月

item.title: What has changed? — Unhedged
item.author: Unhedged
item.description:
Unhedged

特朗普政府在伊朗局勢上的政策趨向緩和，市場應聲上升，但分析認為市場結構已發生深層變化，難以回到疫情前狀態。

As President Donald Trump’s confusing messages on the Iran war seem to coalesce around a retreat, markets have risen. But are we really going back to anything like what we had before February 28? Today on the show, Katie Martin and Rob Armstrong try to understand the meaningful changes that will persist. Also, they go long bank earnings and short "maxing" anything. For a free 30-day trial to the Unhedged newsletter go to: https://www.ft.com/unhedgedoffer . You can email Robert Armstrong and Kati...

Duration: 20:54

#特朗普 #伊朗 #市場 #銀行業績 #政策變化 #地緣政治 #金融市場

item.title: DOJ Opens Probe Into NFL’s Sports TV Deals — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

美國司法部對NFL體育電視轉播交易展開調查，涉及反競爭行為推高消費者觀看成本的指控。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Isabelle Lee -Randall Williams, Bloomberg Business of Sports Reporter, discusses news that the US Justice Department has opened an investigation into whether the National Football League is engaging in anticompetitive tactics that drive up the cost for consumers of watching games. That’s according to a person familiar with the matter. The Wall Street Journal reported earlie...

Duration: 22:59

#美國司法部 #NFL #體育電視交易 #反競爭 #消費者成本

item.title: Thomas Peterffy on Interactive Brokers' Plan to Professionalize Prediction Markets — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

互動經紀商創辦人Thomas Peterffy計劃推動預測市場專業化，以吸引機構投資者參與。

Right now, when you think about prediction markets, you basically think about two main companies: Polymarket and Kalshi. And then when you think of what's being traded on those platforms, there's a whole range of stuff from elections to sports to real economic outcomes, to totally gonzo random stuff, like who will win the next season of Big Brother . So far, sports is where a lot of the money is. But at least in theory, prediction markets could be a popular instrument for professional, instituti...

Duration: 50:56

#Thomas Peterffy #Interactive Brokers #預測市場 #Polymarket #Kalshi

item.title: Where AI data centers are reducing power bills — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

人工智能數據中心大幅增加電力需求，導致其周邊地區批發電價飆升，引發民眾反彈，但專家認為應從老舊電網長期問題尋根。

Over the last half decade, wholesale electricity prices have increased 267% in places close to data centers. That’s contributed to a backlash against new ones. But some experts believe data centers are a scapegoat for long-term issues with an aging U.S. grid. Today on the show, we ask who is responsible for rising electricity prices and whether the U.S. can handle a new era of grid growth. Come see Planet Money live on stage! 12 cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com/#tour Related epi...

Duration: 8:03

#人工智能數據中心 #電力價格 #電網 #能源成本 #美國基礎設施 #電力供應 #能源政策

item.title: How long will the Iran energy shock last? With Chris Giles — The Economics Show
item.author: The Economics Show
item.description:
The Economics Show

伊朗能源衝擊對全球經濟造成損害，停火後經濟影響將持續多久成關鍵問題。

President Donald Trump backed off his threats to wipe out “a whole civilization". Instead, we have a ceasefire – at least for now. But how much damage has the conflict between Iran, the US and Israel already done to the global economy? Where will that damage show up next? And how long will the effects of the Iran shock be felt? Soumaya Keynes speaks to the FT’s economics commentator Chris Giles to discuss the economic consequences of the war and what policymakers should be doing to mitigate them...

Duration: 30:45

#伊朗 #能源 #衝擊 #停火 #全球經濟 #Chris Giles

item.title: Search Engine Presents: Are you a good driver? — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

探討Google秘密項目如何推動無人駕駛汽車上路，並檢視機器人駕駛是否比人類更安全。

The story of how a secret project at Google led to driverless cars on American roads. And, an answer to the question: are the robots actually safer drivers than we are? Find Part 2: “The Trial of the Driverless Car” HERE See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

Duration: 1:08:09

#Google #無人駕駛汽車 #自動駕駛 #秘密項目 #安全駕駛 #機器人駕駛 #美國

item.title: Meet Tether: The Most Powerful Crypto Firm You’ve Never Heard Of — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

Tether在十年間成長為全球加密貨幣巨頭，其美元掛鈎穩定幣成為業界關鍵基礎設施，正邁向成為全球最高估值私人公司之列。

In just over a decade, Tether has grown from an idea into a global crypto juggernaut, poised to become one of the world’s most highly valued private companies. But where did its dollar-linked stablecoin come from and where is it headed? On today’s Big Take podcast, Bloomberg reporter Todd Gillespie and guest host Stacey Vanek Smith unpack one of the most powerful companies you’ve (maybe) never heard of. Read more: With Billions to Spend, Tether Finds New Allies in Washington As Lutnick Sold Cant...

Duration: 19:31

#Tether #加密貨幣 #穩定幣 #美元 #Bloomberg #Todd Gillespie #Stacey Vanek Smith #私人公司

item.title: Delta Predicts $2 Billion Fuel Hit With CEO Cautious on Outlook — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

達美航空預計燃油成本增加20億美元，首席執行官對前景持謹慎態度。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu -George Ferguson, Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Aerospace, Defense, & Airlines Analyst, discusses earnings from Delta Airlines. Delta Air Lines expects to incur more than $2 billion in higher fuel costs through June because of the Iran war. The increase in fuel prices is forcing carriers to weigh how much of the higher expense they can pass on through fares witho...

Duration: 16:27

#達美航空 #燃油成本 #伊朗戰爭 #機票漲價 #航空業 #盈利預測

item.title: How are drivers riding out the gas crisis? — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

美國駕駛者面對油價危機，汽油平均價格超過每加侖4美元，加州更接近6美元，節目探討駕駛者的應對策略及其年度成本影響。

Come see Planet Money live on stage! 12 cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com If you’re a commuter, gas prices may not be your friend right now. The average cost of a gallon is more than $4 across the country. California’s average is close to $6. So how are drivers around the country responding? Today on the show, we hear how they’re adapting to higher prices and how much this gas price increase could cost Americans over the year. Related episodes: Will Trump’s shipping insurance pla...

Duration: 9:09

#駕駛者 #油價危機 #汽油價格 #美國 #加州 #平均成本 #能源危機

item.title: A pro-worker experiment in private equity — Planet Money
item.author: Planet Money
item.description:
Planet Money

私募基金高層嘗試向員工分配股權，以平衡公司生產力提升與就業保障之間的矛盾。

Live event info and tickets here. If your company got bought by a private equity firm, how would you feel? Maybe a little nervous? You might find yourself wondering if there will be layoffs. And you’d be right to worry about that. Research shows that while private equity ownership can boost a company’s productivity, it does generally result in job cuts. But one private equity executive is trying to do things a different way – giving workers equity, little cuts of ownership in their own companies...

Duration: 25:41

#私募基金 #員工股權 #工人權益 #公司收購 #裁員 #生產力 #所有權分配

item.title: Guns and butter and credit — Unhedged
item.author: Unhedged
item.description:
Unhedged

節目討論「槍炮與黃油」經濟學概念及其對當代通脹的啟示，並分析消費信貸狀況。

Economists often compare today’s era to the 1970s, when oil prices were high and inflation was looming. But there is something to learn from the 1960s, too. Today on the show, Rob Armstrong and Hakyung Kim discuss “guns and butter”, and the state of consumer credit. Also they go short flights to Europe and short AI glasses. For a free 30-day trial to the Unhedged newsletter go to: https://www.ft.com/unhedgedoffer . You can email Robert Armstrong and Katie Martin at unhedged@ft.com . Read a trans...

Duration: 15:24

#槍炮與黃油 #經濟 #通脹 #消費信貸 #1960年代 #1970年代

item.title: Taxes Are Due Soon. Should the Rich Pay More? — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

全球範圍內「向富人加稅」的呼聲日益高漲，從倫敦到加州的政界人士都在推動稅改，但政府的實際回應及政治障礙仍存在分歧。

From London to California, calls to “tax the rich” are growing. But what are they calling for in practice, and how are governments responding? On today’s Big Take podcast, host Sarah Holder talks to Bloomberg reporters Charlie Wells and Laura Nahmias about the fight over taxes for the world’s wealthiest, and what a political tussle between New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani and New York Governor Kathy Hochul reveals about the hurdles some measures are facing. Read more: ‘Soak the Rich’ Battle Cr...

Duration: 20:50

#加稅 #富人 #倫敦 #加州 #紐約市市長 #州長 #稅收改革

item.title: Ackman Pitches $65 Billion UMG Deal to Move Listing to US — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

美國投資家艾克曼旗下公司Pershing Square提議與環球音樂集團合併，並將其在美上市。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney, Emily Graffeo, and Alexis Christoforous -Matthew Bloxham, Bloomberg Intelligence Senior and Tech Analyst, discusses Bill Ackman's investment firm Pershing Square Capital Management pitching a deal to combine Universal Music Group with an acquisition vehicle publicly traded in the US. -Mandeep Singh, Global Tech Research Head at Bloomberg Intelligence, discusses the latest on B...

Duration: 25:40

#艾克曼 #Pershing Square #環球音樂集團 #UMG #美國上市 #並購交易

item.title: Why infinite scroll's inventor wants to kill his creation — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

無限滾動功能的發明者Aza Raskin因擔憂該功能成癮性，現正推動社交媒體平台作出改革，並曾作證指控Meta令兒童沉迷。

We practically live on our phones these days. Scrolling and scrolling, endlessly. Entrepreneur Aza Raskin is responsible for creating this infinite scroll. He also testified against Meta, who have been under fire — and in court — charged with making their apps addictive to children. On today’s show: Raskin tells us about the changes he thinks platforms should make to help people take their attention back. Come see Planet Money live on stage! 12 cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com R...

Duration: 9:28

#無限滾動 #Aza Raskin #Meta #成癮 #社交媒體 #兒童 #科技平台 #注意力

item.title: Trump Escalates Threats to Iran — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

特朗普對伊朗升級威脅，揚言若不重開荷魯茲海峽將發動攻擊，美伊談判局勢緊張。

President Trump intensified his threats on Iran Tuesday morning posting on Truth Social, "A whole civilization will die tonight, never to be brought back again." This escalation follows a post on Monday saying the US would attack its bridges and power facilities if it failed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz to shipping traffic by 8pm ET Tuesday night. On today’s Big Take podcast, host Sarah Holder sits down with White House correspondent Courtney Subramanian to unpack the state of negotiations bet...

Duration: 19:17

#特朗普 #伊朗 #荷魯茲海峽 #美國 #威脅 #談判 #停火

item.title: Ferraris, Advil, and AI Chips 10 Companies to Watch Right Now — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

彭博智庫分析師推薦十間值得關注的企業，涵蓋多個行業領域，並指出未來數月內的關鍵催化劑。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu -- Tim Craighead, Bloomberg Intelligence Global Chief Content Officer, discusses 10 companies to watch right now in 2Q. Bloomberg Intelligence analysts have identified the most interesting names from their group of high-confidence Focus Ideas. Spanning sectors and regions, each scenario outlines a catalyst in the next few months. - Youkyung Lee, Bloomberg Asia St...

Duration: 18:24

#Ferrari #Advil #AI芯片 #彭博智庫 #Micron Technology #焦點創意 #股票市場 #科技行業

item.title: Gina Raimondo on How European Industry Is Getting Crushed — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

美國與歐洲關係在安全與經濟領域惡化，歐洲產業面臨美國關稅衝擊，需尋求應對策略。

The relationship between the US and Europe is deteriorating along both security and economic dimensions. The Trump administration has imposed tariffs, while also being sharply critical of NATO allies. So what are European leaders to do? Hope things go back to normal in the US? Or perhaps become closer with China? Our guest on this episode says the latter would be a grave mistake. This episode was recorded live on April 1 at the DC headquarters of the Council on Foreign Relations. We spoke with G...

Duration: 45:45

#Gina Raimondo #歐洲產業 #美國關稅 #美歐關係 #NATO #經濟 #安全

item.title: Is the economy red, orange, yellow or green? — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

節目邀請兩位美國聯邦儲備委員會地區主席討論當前經濟狀況，以紅橙黃綠色系評估經濟溫度。

Come see Planet Money live on stage! 12 cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com It’s not often you get to talk to a regional Fed president, let alone two at the same time! Today on the show, we take the temperature of the economy with regional Fed presidents Austan Goolsbee and Beth Hammack. Related episodes: One Fed battle after another America's next top Fed Chair For sponsor-free episodes of The Indicator from Planet Money, subscribe to Planet Money+ via Apple Podcasts or at plus.np...

Duration: 9:23

#經濟 #聯邦儲備委員會 #地區主席 #Austan Goolsbee #Beth Hammack #經濟溫度 #美國經濟

item.title: Reese’s heir vs. chocolate skimpflation — Planet Money
item.author: Planet Money
item.description:
Planet Money

好時公司被指控在Reese's花生醬巧克力中使用廉價替代食材，引發消費者對「偷工減料通脹」現象的關注。

Live event info and tickets here. When ingredient costs skyrocket, companies have three basic options: They can raise their prices (a sort of product-specific inflation), shrink the size of the products (often called “shrinkflation”), or, sometimes, find more creative ways to reduce costs by degrading the quality of their products - which our very own Greg Rosalsky has dubbed as  “skimpflation.” The latest alleged culprit? Hershey’s. The Hershey Company is using ingredients in some of their Rees...

Duration: 33:42

#Reese's #好時公司 #巧克力 #花生醬 #偷工減料通脹 #食材成本 #產品品質

item.title: Fan Favorite: Japan’s New Horizon — Wall Street Week
item.author: Wall Street Week
item.description:
Wall Street Week

日本經濟在失落三十年後迎來轉機，私募資本與商業文化改革成為推動下一輪增長的關鍵。

On this special, fan favorite edition of Bloomberg Wall Street Week, we travel to Japan to bring you stories of how its economy could be turning the page after 30 years of stagnation. After the so-called ‘lost decades,’ Apollo Global Management’s Marc Rowan explains why there’s a ‘new swagger’ in Japan now. Plus, can private capital help power Japan’s next growth cycle? Later, after decades of caution and stability, Japan’s business culture now faces a defining test as reform collides with tradi...

Duration: 48:00

#日本 #經濟 #失落十年 #私募資本 #商業文化 #改革 #增長 #Marc Rowan

item.title: Jobs that new college grads are and are not landing — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

美國就業市場呈現「低招聘、低裁員」狀態，新大學畢業生面臨嚴峻就業前景；節目走訪霍華德大學了解應屆畢業生的求職狀況。

Come see Planet Money live on stage! 12 cities. Details and tix here: planetmoneybook.com Economists have described the state of the jobs market as “low hire, low fire.” That means employers are not cutting many jobs, but they're also not adding much either, a dismal prospect for many new college grads. On this edition of Jobs Friday, we go to Howard University in Washington, D.C. to see how graduating seniors are faring. Related episodes: Just how bad are these jobs numbers? Do I need a four-ye...

Duration: 8:40

#大學畢業生 #就業市場 #招聘 #霍華德大學 #華盛頓特區 #經濟 #工作

item.title: The Future of Addictive Design + Going Deep at DeepMind + HatGPT — Hard Fork
item.author: Hard Fork
item.description:
Hard Fork

探討成癮性設計的未來發展、DeepMind的深度研究，以及HatGPT等議題，分析科技平台面臨的監管與法律風險。

“The platforms should be absolutely begging Congress to regulate them because the alternative is they get sued into oblivion by a bunch of law firms.”

Duration: 1:09:26 · Ep. 188

#成癮性設計 #DeepMind #HatGPT #科技平台 #監管 #法律風險 #國會 #人工智能

item.title: Scott Bok Explains What Investment Bankers Actually Do All Day — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

投資銀行前行政總裁Scott Bok解釋投資銀行家的日常工作職責，探討AI對白領工作的潛在衝擊。

There's obviously a lot of talk these days about AI and possible destruction of white collar jobs. Intuitively bankers might be expected to be victims of this. But before we can answer whether AI can disrupt an industry, or a line of work, we have to know what the job actually entails. What do investment bankers actually do, and why are they paid for it? To answer this question, we speak with Scott Bok, the longtime former CEO of the investment bank Greenhill. Scott is also the author of the boo...

Duration: 54:28

#Scott Bok #投資銀行 #Greenhill #華爾街 #AI #白領工作 #金融業

item.title: Trump Made His Case for War With Iran. It Backfired — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

特朗普就對伊朗開戰向美國民眾陳詞，承諾迅速結束衝突但續言將進行數週激烈軍事行動，言論自相矛盾引發市場及盟國擔憂。

After a month of fighting, President Trump took his case for war with Iran to the American people Wednesday night. In a prime-time address that sent energy markets surging, he promised both an imminent end to the conflict and two to three weeks of further intense military strikes. On today’s Big Take podcast, host Sarah Holder and Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Jeff Mason unpack the president’s brief, often contradictory speech. They discuss how it put investors and key allies on the back fo...

Duration: 18:43

#特朗普 #伊朗 #宣戰 #軍事行動 #中東衝突 #美國政策 #能源市場

item.title: How an energy crisis unfolds — Unhedged
item.author: Unhedged
item.description:
Unhedged

探討伊朗戰爭如何引發全球能源危機，分析戰後能源供應恢復的時間表及市場前景。

World energy supplies have been disrupted by the Iran war. But how long will they take to return to normal after the war is over? Today on the show, Katie Martin and the FT’s energy editor Malcolm Moore game out global energy outcomes. Also, they go long coal and short the wisdom of the markets. For a free 30-day trial to the Unhedged newsletter go to: https://www.ft.com/unhedgedoffer . You can email Robert Armstrong and Katie Martin at unhedged@ft.com . Read a transcript of this episode on FT.c...

Duration: 16:47

#能源危機 #伊朗戰爭 #全球能源 #煤炭 #能源供應

item.title: Tesla’s EV Sales Miss Expectations Again in Deepening Slump — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

特斯拉電動車銷售再次未達預期，公司陷入銷售困境；電動車市場競爭加劇，特斯拉核心業務面臨轉型挑戰。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu - David Welch, Bloomberg Detroit Bureau Chief, discusses Tesla sales. Tesla Inc. posted one of its worst sales quarters in years, missing Wall Street’s expectations, as the carmaker struggles to turn around its core business and navigate an increasingly challenged electric-vehicle market. Separately, Stellantis is discussing options for building electric vehicles...

Duration: 17:16

#Tesla #電動車銷售 #銷售下滑 #華爾街預期 #電動車市場 #特斯拉困境

item.title: SpaceX Said to File Confidentially for IPO Before AI Rivals — Bloomberg Intelligence
item.author: Bloomberg Intelligence
item.description:
Bloomberg Intelligence

SpaceX秘密申報首次公開募股，公司估值可能超過1.75萬億美元，有望成為史上最大規模上市。

Watch Scarlet and Paul LIVE every day on YouTube: http://bit.ly/3vTiACF . Bloomberg Intelligence hosted by Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu - Anthony Hughes, Bloomberg US Equity Capital Markets Reporter, discusses SpaceX  filing confidentially for an initial public offering, bringing the company closer to delivering the biggest-ever listing. The company submitted its draft IPO registration to the US Securities and Exchange Commission and could seek a valuation in the IPO of more than $1.75 trillion. ...

Duration: 17:44

#SpaceX #IPO #首次公開募股 #估值 #證券交易委員會 #AI競爭對手 #上市

item.title: This Is How to Tell if Writing Was Made by AI — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

探討如何辨別人工智能生成的文字，分析AI文章的特徵與潛在風險，包括學術作弊、詐騙聊天機器人等問題。

When you consider the fact that many people don't know how and where to place a comma, it's safe to say that AI is already better than most people at writing. It's clean copy. It can be surprisingly persuasive. And sometimes, it's even informative. But there's frequently still something about it that just seems... off. Many people can tell quite quickly when they're reading AI-generated text. And beyond the style, the existence of AI generated text has all kinds of ramifications, from making it ...

Duration: 48:32

#人工智能 #AI寫作 #文字辨別 #學術作弊 #聊天機器人 #文本生成 #寫作風格

item.title: Greetings from: Our favorite public goods — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

節目介紹全球各地令人矚目的公共物品，如海上自由、全球定位系統及大型強子對撞機等，探討其對人類社會的貢獻。

Freedom of the Seas. GPS. The Large Hadron Collider. These are all public goods that make our world more prosperous, accurate, and knowledgeable. But we don’t always give them the attention they deserve. Today on the show, the Planet Money book’s main author Alex Mayyasi joins us to take an audio world tour of spectacular public goods, one whimsical postcard at a time. These postcards are gorgeously illustrated in the Planet Money book . Come see Planet Money live on stage in April! 12 cities. D...

Duration: 6:52

#公共物品 #Planet Money #Alex Mayyasi #全球定位系統 #大型強子對撞機 #海上自由 #明信片 #繁榮

item.title: Economic warfare: lessons from history, with Mark Harrison — The Economics Show
item.author: The Economics Show
item.description:
The Economics Show

經濟戰爭已有數百年歷史，本集探討制裁、關稅、封鎖等經濟武器的效果，並從歷史教訓看伊朗、俄羅斯等當代案例。

Warring countries have attacked each other’s economies for hundreds of years. But do the tools of economic warfare – sanctions, tariffs, blockades and embargoes – actually work? Soumaya speaks to Mark Harrison, emeritus professor of economics at Warwick university, and co-editor (with Stephen Broadberry) of Economic Warfare and Sanctions since 1688 , about what centuries of economic conflict can teach us about Iran (and Russia) today. Subscribe to Soumaya's show on Apple , Spotify , Pocket Casts...

Duration: 26:05

#經濟戰爭 #制裁 #關稅 #馬克·哈里森 #歷史 #伊朗 #俄羅斯 #經濟衝突

item.title: Special Report: President Trump's Prime Time Address — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

特朗普總統發表黃金時段演講，警告將在數周內對伊朗採取極端行動，言論引發股市下跌及油價飆升。

US President Donald Trump spoke for nearly 20 minutes from the White House, saying the US would hit Iran “extremely hard” in the next two to three weeks, and that he’d strike key infrastructure like electric plants if no deal is reached. Stocks fell and oil jumped on his comments, with Brent rising 5% as Trump talked about possible escalation and reiterated his call for other nations to step in to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz. This is a developing story. We are live blogging at Bloomberg.co...

Duration: 18:23

#特朗普 #伊朗 #白宮 #演講 #石油 #股市 #荷莫茲海峽

item.title: Dark times for Cuba’s economic experiment — Planet Money
item.author: Planet Money
item.description:
Planet Money

古巴經濟實驗陷入困境，美國禁運石油導致該國醫療、運輸及電力供應系統癱瘓。

Live event info and tickets here. For more than 60 years, Cuba has survived on two seemingly contradictory economic strategies: leaning on friendly communist and socialist countries, and flirting with capitalism. And right now it seems the US is making both strategies impossible. Since January, the U.S. has been preventing almost all oil from reaching the island. Doctors can’t get to the hospitals where they work, many buses aren’t running, trucks can’t deliver food and medicine where they’re ne...

Duration: 27:41

#古巴 #經濟 #美國禁運 #石油 #共產主義 #資本主義 #能源危機

item.title: Meet OpenClaw: The AI Craze Sweeping China — Big Take
item.author: Big Take
item.description:
Big Take

中國AI應用OpenClaw因政府推動與用户FOMO心理而爆紅，但其廣泛獲取個人數據及失控事件引發安全隱憂。

Fueled by a powerful mix of FOMO and a government drive to accelerate AI adoption, OpenClaw has exploded in popularity across China. But as these agentic systems gain sweeping access to personal data, reports of them “going rogue” are beginning to surface. On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, host K. Oanh Ha sits down with Bloomberg’s Luz Ding and Bloomberg Opinion’s Catherine Thorbecke to dig into the rapid rise of agentic AI in China, why it has taken hold so quickly and the mounting security con...

Duration: 18:37

#OpenClaw #中國 #AI #代理系統 #個人數據 #安全風險 #政府推動

item.title: Javier Blas on Why Oil Could Go Much, Much Higher — Odd Lots
item.author: Odd Lots
item.description:
Odd Lots

石油價格自伊朗戰爭爆發後大幅上漲，但仍有進一步上升空間；霍爾木茲海峽關閉造成供應中斷，東亞地區受影響最大。

Oil has shot up by a lot since the start of war with Iran. But it could still get much worse. So far, the massive disruption (due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz) has been cushioned by the drawing down of inventories and distributions from strategic stockpiles. Meanwhile, there is some oil still on tankers that has yet to be delivered. According to Bloomberg Opinion columnist Javier Blas, the potential remains for oil to go much, much higher. On this episode, we speak with Javier about th...

Duration: 41:06

#石油 #伊朗 #戰爭 #霍爾木茲海峽 #Javier Blas #油價 #東亞 #戰略儲備

item.title: Why Pokémon cards are growing faster than your retirement account — The Indicator from Planet Money
item.author: The Indicator from Planet Money
item.description:
The Indicator from Planet Money

寶可夢卡牌市場近年升值迅速，過去一年升幅達170%，增長速度超越不少投資工具。

Pokémon cards are scorching hot right now. An index tracking the thousands of rare cards shows that valuations have increased 170% in the last year alone. Growth like that really makes you wish you hadn’t given away all your childhood cards years ago. Today on the show, we cover three things that are contributing to the rapid growth of shiny cards produced by the world’s highest-grossing media franchise. Come see Planet Money live on stage in April! 12 cities. Details and tix here: https://tix.t...

Duration: 9:12

#寶可夢卡牌 #升值 #收藏品投資 #稀有卡牌 #媒體特許經營 #市場增長 #任天堂

item.title: Finale: The collapse of India’s $22bn tech star — Behind the Money
item.author: Behind the Money
item.description:
Behind the Money

印度教育科技獨角獸Byju's在疫情期間迅速崛起，卻同樣快速瓦解，陷入美國破產訴訟及證人指控風波，反映印度科技產業的風險。

For our final episode: Education start-up Byju’s quickly became the pride of India during the Covid-19 pandemic. But almost as fast as the company rose, it collapsed. The fallout has already resulted in millions of dollars’ worth of US court sanctions and allegations of witness tampering. The FT’s Mumbai bureau chief Chris Kay has been following the legal drama and examines what Byju’s demise means for India’s burgeoning technology sector. Clips from Byju’s, US Bankruptcy Court - District of Del...

Duration: 31:13

#Byju's #印度 #科技公司 #破產 #教育科技 #美國法庭 #證人指控
